gaps.runtimeEvidence: The Explain step contains an absolute amber validation strip that overlaps the card copy.
gaps.expected: Commercial process cards remain clean and fully readable; validation disclosures are not used as marketing overlays.
gaps.rootCause: Foundation release preserved body layout; the overlay predated CR 10.02 and remained pixel-invariant.

gaps.runtimeEvidence: Scenario subtitle uses one-line clamping while an expandable Validation caveat occupies primary setup space.
gaps.expected: Scenario meaning is fully readable; validation remains compact and secondary to target/scenario/action.
gaps.rootCause: Shell-only migration left the route body unchanged.
acceptanceEvidence: validation disclosure hidden from primary setup card

gaps.runtimeEvidence: Runtime is map-dominant but remains an implementation baseline rather than accepted Figma body parity; map visual state and panel proportions differ from the approved prototype family.
gaps.expected: Map-first and criteria-first flows retain behavior while adopting the approved spatial composition, visual hierarchy and evidence cues.
gaps.rootCause: Figma runtime-alignment authority explicitly records shared-shell-only alignment.

gaps.runtimeEvidence: Functional dashboard and comparison states exist but have no post-foundation Figma body-parity receipt.
gaps.expected: One main decision takeaway, drivers, risks, impact, evidence and next action are visually prioritized.
gaps.rootCause: CR 10.02 prohibited body migration and required route-body invariance.

gaps.runtimeEvidence: A4 output collapses metadata and score grids into single columns because a max-width media rule overrides the print layout; pages become sparse and card-heavy.
gaps.expected: Three-column metadata and score grids, two-column executive sections and bounded page density on A4.
gaps.rootCause: Screen-width responsive CSS remains active under the narrow print viewport and is not overridden by later print rules.

gaps.runtimeEvidence: When no canvas capture is available, the report labels the section Map Context Fallback and shows a generic grid/zone schematic that reads as a missing map.
gaps.expected: Captured workspace map is preferred; fallback is a deliberate, clearly labelled schematic site-context diagram with coordinate, geometry and non-official status.
gaps.rootCause: Report snapshot is optional and fallback design is utilitarian rather than client-grade.

gaps.runtimeEvidence: Blue, teal and amber do not yet have a consistently enforced route-level meaning; amber validation can dominate primary commercial/product content.
gaps.expected: Blue structures brand/system UI, teal leads spatial/analytical actions, amber is bounded to validation and red to blocking risk.
gaps.rootCause: Foundation tokens were approved without a full body migration and route-level semantic usage policy.

gaps.runtimeEvidence: Active repository release documents still describe PR #106 and stale Figma node 169:2 even though current Production is PR #111/main ef1314e0 and current master is 1797:2.
gaps.expected: Current Release State, Roadmap, Backlog, QA and Project Hub distinguish foundation release from body migration and point to current external evidence.
gaps.rootCause: Repository snapshots were not synchronized after the latest foundation release.

gaps.runtimeEvidence: Rejected Preview uses a hand-built alternate mark.
gaps.expected: Repository-owned founder-approved IdentitySymbol in header and footer.
gaps.rootCause: Landing body did not reuse the shared identity component.

gaps.runtimeEvidence: Rejected Preview uses an ad hoc live satellite composition.
gaps.expected: Canonical responsive cockpit exports from Figma nodes 1495:53, 1495:725 and 1495:1144.
gaps.rootCause: Approximate runtime reconstruction replaced direct design authority.

gaps.runtimeEvidence: Audience and primary CTA are blue while active interaction mode is teal.
gaps.expected: One spatial-teal primary family for selected audience, active interaction mode and primary CTA.
gaps.rootCause: CR 10.07 override targeted only interaction-mode controls.

gaps.runtimeEvidence: Scenario remains clipped and Validation caveat remains in the primary setup card.
gaps.expected: Full-width readable Scenario and no primary-card Validation caveat.
gaps.rootCause: CSS masking did not replace the underlying JSX structure.

nonClaims: No official parcel, zoning, cadastral, ownership or valuation claim.
No live DLD, GeoDubai or protected-data integration claim.
No Supabase, Auth, Storage or source mutation.
